name: LEGO Construction Co
message: LEGO Construction Co. is a Florida-based construction firm headquartered in the heart of Miami, specialize in healthcare, education, federal projects, correctional facilities, transportation, and historic preservation. LEGO Construction corporate office is located in 1011 Sunnybrook Rd Ste 905, Miami, Florida, 33136, United States and has 34 employees. The total amount of data leakage is 849.5 GB
